overall.description: A first-person driving sequence from a racing simulator showing a car entering and driving through a multi-lane highway tunnel during a rainy night. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic, passing through a distinctive blue-lit section of the tunnel before continuing under standard white lighting.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters a highway tunnel during a rainy night. The windshield wipers sweep raindrops as the car follows a red sedan into the illuminated concrete tunnel, transitioning from the dark exterior to the artificially lit interior.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a distinctively lit section of the tunnel where blue and purple ambient lighting replaces the standard white illumination. A red sports car overtakes on the right as the ego vehicle continues through this atmospheric zone.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the blue-lit section, the tunnel returns to standard white lighting. The vehicle continues driving with a silver sedan overtaking on the right, maintaining steady progress through the enclosed concrete corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a rainy night exterior into a multi-colored highway tunnel. It begins with windshield wipers clearing raindrops as the car follows a red sedan from the dark night into the artificially lit concrete interior. As the vehicle maintains speed through the standard white-lit corridor, a blue sports car overtakes on the right before the environment shifts into a distinctively atmospheric zone of blue and purple ambient lighting. The scene then transitions back to standard white illumination as a red sports car passes, finally continuing past a silver sedan through the remaining stretch of the enclosed concrete tunnel.
